reasoning_content: Looking at task 5, I need to implement four functions in the MIR emitter: `emitBinary` to convert binary operations to RV64 instructions, `emitICmpInst` to handle integer comparisons and produce 0 or 1 results, `emitLoadInst` to emit load instructions (LD or LW depending on type), and `emitStoreInst` to emit store instructions (SD or SW).

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && ls task/5/ && cat task/5/config.cmake task/5/CMakeLists.txt
